title: eryngium triquetrum
intro: Eryngium triquetrum, also known as Three-cornered Leek or Snake's Eye, is a biennial plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that grows up to 1 meter tall and has yellow flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Eryngium triquetrum include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Eryngium triquetrum can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dried herb, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
